document.title: 안전인증서 Safety Certificate
authorityOrJurisdiction: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act
document.revisionOrVersion: Safety Certification No. HU10003-17190C; Receipt No. KCA2022-12187

sourceSummary.oneLine: Korea Testing Certification Institute safety certificate for DC power supply model POE29U-1AT(PL).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports evidence that POE29U-1AT(PL) was issued Korean electrical safety certification HU10003-17190C under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act.
keyPoints: Product name is 직류전원장치 and basic model is POE29U-1AT(PL).
Rating is 100-240 V~, 50-60 Hz, 0.8 A with output 56 Vdc, 0.536 A.
Certificate date shown is 2022 년 11 월 15 일.
The certificate includes critical components, registered model description, multiple factories, and revision status.

entities.name: PHIHONG VIETNAM CO., LTD.
entities.evidence: 다수의 공장의 명(Name) PHIHONG VIETNAM CO., LTD.

entities.name: Dongguan Phitek Electronics Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: 다수의 공장의 명(Name) Dongguan Phitek Electronics Co., Ltd.

entities.evidence: 다수의 공장의 명(Name) Phihong (Dongguan) Electronics Co., Ltd. Qingxi Tiesong Site

concepts.name: Safety Certificate
concepts.evidence: 안 전 인 증 서 Safety Certificate

concepts.name: KC Mark marking
concepts.evidence: 전기용품의 표시 : 전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법 시행규칙 제20조(안전인증의 표시)에 따라 표시한다.

concepts.name: Critical Components
concepts.evidence: 안전관리 부품 및 재질목록(List of Critical Components)

concepts.name: Certificate revision application
concepts.evidence: In case of the following events, the Safety Certificate shall be reapplied and reissued for revision

concepts.name: Follow-up factory inspection
concepts.evidence: Recipients of the Safety Certificate shall require to inspect once in two years according to the Article 7 section of the the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act.

evidence.claim: The document is a safety certificate.
evidence.evidenceText: 안 전 인 증 서 Safety Certificate

evidence.claim: The safety certification number is HU10003-17190C.
The certified product is a DC power supply.
The product rating is 100-240 V~, 50-60 Hz, 0.8 A with output 56 Vdc, 0.536 A.
evidence.evidenceText: 정격/안전기준상의 모델구분 : 100-240 V~, 50-60 Hz, 0.8 A (O/P: 56 Vdc, 0.536 A)

evidence.claim: The certificate was issued by Korea Testing Certification Institute.
The certificate was issued under the Enforcement Rule of the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act.
evidence.evidenceText: We issue this Safety Certificate for the above appliances in accordance with Article 9(2), 9(4), 10(2) or 15(2) of the Enforcement Rule of the Electirical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act.
evidence.pageTarget: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act

evidence.claim: The certificate is limited to product safety confirmation under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act.
evidence.evidenceText: 이 인증서는 「전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법」에 따른 제품의 안전성 확인에 한정된 것이며
evidence.pageTarget: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act

evidence.claim: The product is described as converting AC main voltage to DC low voltage.
evidence.evidenceText: The apparatus designed to be used for converting AC main voltage to DC low voltage. (Normal use)

evidence.claim: The registered model list shows POE29U-1AT(PL) as the basic model.
evidence.evidenceText: 기본모델 (Basic model) POE29U-1AT(PL) 100-240 V~, 50-60 Hz, 0.8 A (O/P: 56 Vdc, 0.536 A)

evidence.claim: Certificate revision status includes dates 2017/08/07, 2020/01/08, and 2022/11/15.
Recipients must apply for certificate revision if critical components are changed, modified, or alternated.
evidence.evidenceText: The certificate holder should apply for a revision of the certificate if the registered critical components are to be changed, modified or alternated.

reviewFlags.reason: Metadata authoritySignal is MFDS/domestic, but the source text identifies Korea Testing Certification Institute and the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, not MFDS.
No separate revision or version number is explicitly labeled; document identifiers and revision-status dates were used for revisionOrVersion.
Source text contains OCR or transcription artifacts such as 'Applcation', 'Electirical', irregular spacing, and line breaks in addresses and tables.
